title: Service is up but nobody can reach it on port 8080
description_md:
Monitoring says the web service on this box should answer on port 8080, but health checks to `http://localhost:8080/` all fail with connection refused. The nginx process is definitely running. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), find out what port it's *actually* listening on, and make it serve on 8080 as intended.

You're done when `curl http://localhost:8080/` succeeds.
